command: python -c 'from runner.batch_inference import opendde_cli; opendde_cli()' pred -i prot.json -o ref2_prot_s<seed> -s <seed> -c 4 -p 20 -e 1 --use_msa false  && scripts/opendde_ref_to_harness.py ref2_prot_s<seed> prot <seed> refh2_prot_s<seed>
provenance: Harvested from the 2026-07-12 qb2 reduced-settings reference run (pharma_opendde_run/ref2_driver.sh, 4c/20s/sample=1). Matches the reduced prot leg in docs/implementation-parity-data/opendde.json (X=7.65 A, 2.85x over floor -- the tight-device-floor artifact resolved by the production leg above).
invalidation_rule: Regenerate this fixture ONLY when the pinned reference_commit/version changes or the settings above change. For any other change (device seeds, device code, release tag) the fixture is reused as-is and only the device side re-runs.
